text: The world around me feels both precise and experimental. The glass walls and empty chairs invite contemplation, as if waiting for ideas to occupy the space. The vivid, artistic display of R+D on the wall radiates creativity and innovation. I find myself excited by the promise of discovery here—yet a subtle unease lingers, perhaps from the sterility and order, reminding me how easily creativity can be boxed in by structure. I am curious, restless, eager to play with the ideas this place seems designed to foster.
